/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/XtreamPlayer.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/XtreamPlayer.dir/XtreamPlayer_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/XtreamPlayer.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/XtreamPlayer.dir/src/config.cpp.o CMakeFiles/XtreamPlayer.dir/src/xtreamclient.cpp.o CMakeFiles/XtreamPlayer.dir/src/m3uparser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/XtreamPlayer.dir/src/epgmanager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/XtreamPlayer.dir/src/mpvwidget.cpp.o CMakeFiles/XtreamPlayer.dir/src/mainwindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/XtreamPlayer.dir/src/sourcedialog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/XtreamPlayer.dir/src/settingsdialog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/XtreamPlayer.dir/src/multiviewdialog.cpp.o -o XtreamPlayer  /usr/lib/libQt6Network.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/libQt6Xml.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/libQt6OpenGLWidgets.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/libQt6Concurrent.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/libQt6Svg.so.6.10.2 -lmpv /usr/lib/libz.so /usr/lib/libQt6Widgets.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/libQt6OpenGL.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/libQt6Gui.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.10.2
